# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - staging
  - production

variables:
  APP_NAME: "myapp"
  BUILD_DIR: "build_output"

# Build stage - compile and package application
build_binaries:
  stage: build
  image: golang:1.21
  script:
    - mkdir -p ${BUILD_DIR}/bin
    - mkdir -p ${BUILD_DIR}/configs
    - echo "Building application binaries..."
    - go build -o ${BUILD_DIR}/bin/${APP_NAME} ./cmd/main.go
    - go build -o ${BUILD_DIR}/bin/${APP_NAME}-worker ./cmd/worker/main.go
    - cp -r configs/* ${BUILD_DIR}/configs/
    - echo "BUILD_VERSION=$(git describe --tags --always)" > ${BUILD_DIR}/build_info.env
    - echo "BUILD_DATE=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" >> ${BUILD_DIR}/build_info.env
    - echo "BUILD_COMMIT=${CI_COMMIT_SHA}" >> ${BUILD_DIR}/build_info.env
    - chmod +x ${BUILD_DIR}/bin/*
    - ls -la ${BUILD_DIR}/bin/
    - ls -la ${BUILD_DIR}/configs/
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - ${BUILD_DIR}/bin/
      - ${BUILD_DIR}/configs/
      - ${BUILD_DIR}/build_info.env
    expire_in: 30 days
    name: "${APP_NAME}-${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
  tags:
    - docker

build_docker_context:
  stage: build
  image: docker:24.0
  services:
    - docker:24.0-dind
  script:
    - mkdir -p docker_artifacts
    - echo "Building Docker image..."
    - docker build -t ${APP_NAME}:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} .
    - docker save ${APP_NAME}:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} -o docker_artifacts/${APP_NAME}-image.tar
    - gzip docker_artifacts/${APP_NAME}-image.tar
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - docker_artifacts/
    expire_in: 30 days
    name: "${APP_NAME}-docker-${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
  tags:
    - docker

generate_manifests:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:3.18
  script:
    - mkdir -p manifests
    - apk add --no-cache gettext
    - export APP_VERSION=${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - export APP_IMAGE="${APP_NAME}:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    - envsubst < templates/deployment.yaml.tpl > manifests/deployment.yaml
    - envsubst < templates/service.yaml.tpl > manifests/service.yaml
    - envsubst < templates/configmap.yaml.tpl > manifests/configmap.yaml
    - cat manifests/deployment.yaml
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - manifests/
    expire_in: 30 days
    name: "${APP_NAME}-manifests-${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
  tags:
    - docker

# Test stage - downloads build artifacts automatically
unit_tests:
  stage: test
  image: golang:1.21
  needs:
    - job: build_binaries
      artifacts: true
  script:
    - echo "Verifying build artifacts are available..."
    - ls -la ${BUILD_DIR}/bin/
    - cat ${BUILD_DIR}/build_info.env
    - echo "Running unit tests against built binaries..."
    - go test ./... -v -coverprofile=coverage.out
    - go tool cover -html=coverage.out -o coverage.html
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - coverage.out
      - coverage.html
    expire_in: 30 days
    reports:
      coverage_report:
        coverage_format: cobertura
        path: coverage.out
  tags:
    - docker

integration_tests:
  stage: test
  image: golang:1.21
  needs:
    - job: build_binaries
      artifacts: true
    - job: generate_manifests
      artifacts: true
  services:
    - postgres:15
    - redis:7
  variables:
    POSTGRES_DB: testdb
    POSTGRES_USER: testuser
    POSTGRES_PASSWORD: testpass
    DATABASE_URL: "postgres://testuser:testpass@postgres:5432/testdb?sslmode=disable"
    REDIS_URL: "redis://redis:6379"
  script:
    - echo "Starting application binary for integration testing..."
    - source ${BUILD_DIR}/build_info.env
    - echo "Testing build version ${BUILD_VERSION}"
    - ./${BUILD_DIR}/bin/${APP_NAME} --config ${BUILD_DIR}/configs/test.yaml &
    - sleep 5
    - echo "Running integration tests..."
    - go test ./integration/... -v -tags=integration
    - echo "Verifying manifests..."
    - cat manifests/deployment.yaml
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - integration_results/
    expire_in: 30 days
    when: always
  tags:
    - docker

smoke_test_docker:
  stage: test
  image: docker:24.0
  services:
    - docker:24.0-dind
  needs:
    - job: build_docker_context
      artifacts: true
  script:
    - echo "Loading Docker image from artifact..."
    - gunzip docker_artifacts/${APP_NAME}-image.tar.gz
    - docker load -i docker_artifacts/${APP_NAME}-image.tar
    - echo "Running smoke tests on Docker image..."
    - docker run --rm ${APP_NAME}:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} --version
    - docker run -d --name smoke-test -p 8080:8080 ${APP_NAME}:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - sleep 10
    - docker exec smoke-test wget -qO- http://localhost:8080/health || exit 1
    - docker logs smoke-test
    - docker stop smoke-test
  tags:
    - docker

# Staging deployment - uses artifacts from build and test
deploy_staging:
  stage: staging
  image: alpine/k8s:1.28.2
  needs:
    - job: build_binaries
      artifacts: true
    - job: build_docker_context
      artifacts: true
    - job: generate_manifests
      artifacts: true
    - job: unit_tests
      artifacts: false
    - job: integration_tests
      artifacts: false
    - job: smoke_test_docker
      artifacts: false
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
  script:
    - echo "=== Deploying to Staging ==="
    - source ${BUILD_DIR}/build_info.env
    - echo "Deploying version ${BUILD_VERSION} (commit ${BUILD_COMMIT})"
    - echo "Loading and pushing Docker image to registry..."
    - gunzip docker_artifacts/${APP_NAME}-image.tar.gz || true
    - echo "Applying Kubernetes manifests..."
    - kubectl config use-context staging
    - kubectl apply -f manifests/configmap.yaml
    - kubectl apply -f manifests/service.yaml
    - kubectl apply -f manifests/deployment.yaml
    - echo "Waiting for rollout..."
    - kubectl rollout status deployment/${APP_NAME} --timeout=300s
    - echo "Verifying deployment..."
    - kubectl get pods -l app=${APP_NAME}
    - echo "Running post-deployment health check..."
    - |
      for i in $(seq 1 10); do
        if curl -sf https://staging.example.com/health; then
          echo "Health check passed"
          break
        fi
        echo "Attempt $i failed, retrying in 10s..."
        sleep 10
      done
    - echo "Copying configs to shared volume..."
    - kubectl cp ${BUILD_DIR}/configs/ $(kubectl get pod -l app=${APP_NAME} -o jsonpath='{.items[0].metadata.name}'):/app/configs/
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - ${BUILD_DIR}/build_info.env
      - manifests/
    expire_in: 30 days
    name: "${APP_NAME}-staging-deploy-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
  tags:
    - docker
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main" || $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "develop"

verify_staging:
  stage: staging
  image: alpine:3.18
  needs:
    - job: deploy_staging
      artifacts: true
  script:
    - apk add --no-cache curl jq
    - source ${BUILD_DIR}/build_info.env
    - echo "Verifying staging deployment for version ${BUILD_VERSION}"
    - |
      DEPLOYED_VERSION=$(curl -sf https://staging.example.com/version | jq -r '.version')
      echo "Deployed version: ${DEPLOYED_VERSION}"
      if [ "${DEPLOYED_VERSION}" != "${BUILD_VERSION}" ]; then
        echo "Version mismatch! Expected ${BUILD_VERSION}, got ${DEPLOYED_VERSION}"
        exit 1
      fi
    - echo "Running E2E tests against staging..."
    - curl -sf https://staging.example.com/health | jq .
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
  tags:
    - docker
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main" || $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "develop"

# Production deployment - manual approval required
deploy_production:
  stage: production
  image: alpine/k8s:1.28.2
  needs:
    - job: build_binaries
      artifacts: true
    - job: build_docker_context
      artifacts: true
    - job: generate_manifests
      artifacts: true
    - job: verify_staging
      artifacts: false
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://app.example.com
  when: manual
  allow_failure: false
  script:
    - echo "=== Deploying to Production ==="
    - source ${BUILD_DIR}/build_info.env
    - echo "Deploying version ${BUILD_VERSION} (commit ${BUILD_COMMIT})"
    - echo "Pushing Docker image to production registry..."
    - gunzip docker_artifacts/${APP_NAME}-image.tar.gz || true
    - echo "Creating deployment backup..."
    - kubectl config use-context production
    - kubectl get deployment ${APP_NAME} -o yaml > /tmp/previous-deployment.yaml || true
    - echo "Applying Kubernetes manifests to production..."
    - kubectl apply -f manifests/configmap.yaml
    - kubectl apply -f manifests/service.yaml
    - kubectl apply -f manifests/deployment.yaml
    - echo "Monitoring rollout status..."
    - |
      if ! kubectl rollout status deployment/${APP_NAME} --timeout=600s; then
        echo "Rollout failed! Initiating rollback..."
        kubectl rollout undo deployment/${APP_NAME}
        kubectl rollout status deployment/${APP_NAME} --timeout=300s
        exit 1
      fi
    - echo "Deployment successful!"
    - kubectl get pods -l app=${APP_NAME}
    - echo "Running production health checks..."
    - |
      for i in $(seq 1 15); do
        if curl -sf https://app.example.com/health; then
          echo "Production health check passed on attempt $i"
          break
        fi
        if [ $i -eq 15 ]; then
          echo "Health checks failed after 15 attempts. Rolling back..."
          kubectl rollout undo deployment/${APP_NAME}
          exit 1
        fi
        echo "Attempt $i failed, retrying in 15s..."
        sleep 15
      done
    - echo "Copying production configs..."
    - kubectl cp ${BUILD_DIR}/configs/ $(kubectl get pod -l app=${APP_NAME} -o jsonpath='{.items[0].metadata.name}'):/app/configs/
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - ${BUILD_DIR}/build_info.env
      - manifests/
    expire_in: 30 days
    name: "${APP_NAME}-production-deploy-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
  tags:
    - docker
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"

deploy_production_canary:
  stage: production
  image: alpine/k8s:1.28.2
  needs:
    - job: build_binaries
      artifacts: true
    - job: generate_manifests
      artifacts: true
    - job: verify_staging
      artifacts: false
  environment:
    name: production-canary
    url: https://canary.app.example.com
  when: manual
  script:
    - echo "=== Canary Deployment to Production ==="
    - source ${BUILD_DIR}/build_info.env
    - echo "Deploying canary version ${BUILD_VERSION}"
    - kubectl config use-context production
    - sed 's/replicas:.*/replicas: 1/' manifests/deployment.yaml > manifests/canary-deployment.yaml
    - sed -i "s/name: ${APP_NAME}/name: ${APP_NAME}-canary/" manifests/canary-deployment.yaml
    - kubectl apply -f manifests/canary-deployment.yaml
    - kubectl rollout status deployment/${APP_NAME}-canary --timeout=300s
    - echo "Canary deployment active. Monitor metrics before full rollout."
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - ${BUILD_DIR}/build_info.env
      - manifests/
    expire_in: 30 days
    name: "${APP_NAME}-canary-deploy-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
  tags:
    - docker
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"
